draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Cuban Noobster (midlane→carry).

coaching.headline: A 20-minute blowout — you lost EVERY tower (0–10) and the majors 9–12, with every lane read unfavored. Lost in the draft and the opening.
coaching.team: Towers 0-10 in 20 minutes is as one-sided as it gets — you got run off the map before items mattered. Every solo lane was unfavored and they all caved; the majors went 9-12 while 9 of your deaths came caught out, outside any fight. Contest the first Fangtooth as a group instead of losing all three lanes at once.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Group for the first objective instead of losing every lane and the map at once — the solo lanes were all unfavored and caved before items mattered.

perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Lt. Belica mid (0/4/0) into an unfavored Gideon — got run over with no kills; the lane was lost before her Orion spike (~24m) could land.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Muriel support into an unfavored Steel (1/5) — caught out all game as the lanes collapsed.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Yin jungle, 0/2 into an unfavored Crunch — the jungle was behind and couldn't set tempo while every lane caved.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Sevarog offlane (4/7) into an unfavored Iggy & Scorch — your 4 kills were the lone bright spot in a lineup that lost every tower.
perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Sparrow carry (1/2/1) into an unfavored Murdock — quiet line in a 20-minute blowout where no lane held.

threats: Chain-CC risk (2 hard-CC abilities, ~1.8s of lockdown): Crunch Right Crunch (knockup 1.25s), Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Dive threat on your backline: Crunch. Assign peel for your carry and ward your flanks.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Lt. Belica Neural Disruptor (silence 0.5s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Alacrity shield+AS → Consecrated Ground bubble → Reversal global save
ourKits.winCondition: keep the carry alive with global shields and enable their damage
ourKits.passive: abilities grant Sentinel to allies; on-hit bonus
ourKits.playAgainst: she has no damage threat — dive her carry through the shields or pick her first

ourKits.combo: Seismic Assault knockup → Void Bomb → Neural Disruptor silence ult, Void Drone mana drain
ourKits.winCondition: knock up + silence a target and burst with missing-HP scaling
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge Seismic Assault; she's immobile — dive when ult is down

ourKits.combo: Lash Kick gap-close+slow → Windburn %hp basics → Backlash push, Quelling Gale to disengage
ourKits.passive: Rising Storm stacks grant attack speed
ourKits.playWith: a team that lets her side-lane and pick
ourKits.playAgainst: she wants 1v1s — group and burst her; Quelling Gale only stops projectiles

ourKits.combo: Phantom Rush → Subjugate root → Siphon → Colossal Blow
ourKits.winCondition: stack Souls to snowball Siphon and lock down with the root
ourKits.passive: ability kills grant permanent Soul stacks (HP + damage)
ourKits.playWith: a team that converts his root into kills
ourKits.playAgainst: deny his last-hits early to starve Souls; dodge the slow Subjugate

enemyKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
enemyKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
enemyKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
enemyKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

enemyKits.combo: Forward Crunch gap-close stun → Right Crunch knockup → empowered Left Crunch, sustain via Re-Crunch
enemyKits.winCondition: all-in a squishy with the empowered combo and heal back through Re-Crunch
enemyKits.passive: post-ability empowered basic that refunds cooldowns
enemyKits.playWith: peel-stripping engage so he reaches the backline
enemyKits.playAgainst: peel/CC him off — without resets he's stranded; anti-heal blunts Re-Crunch

enemyKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
enemyKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
enemyKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

enemyKits.combo: Static Trap root → Buckshot → Hot Pursuit AS → Long Arm of the Law global snipe
enemyKits.winCondition: trap for the root, then out-range with Shots Fired and finish with the global ult
enemyKits.passive: every 5th basic is a long-range bonus shot
enemyKits.playWith: frontline/peel to protect his low mobility
enemyKits.playAgainst: almost no escape — engage past the trap and he dies

enemyKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
enemyKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
enemyKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
enemyKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
enemyKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
